findings.description: pytest-bdd step definitions not discovered — step fixture names must be in conftest.py or test module namespace for pytest fixture discovery
Alloy loki.source.docker strips __meta_* labels — discovery.relabel required to promote Docker metadata to user-facing labels
Alloy loki.source.docker had targets=[] preventing container discovery — replaced with discovery.docker + discovery.relabel pipeline

decision: Completed Phase 1 implementation: 10 @smoke acceptance tests passing in 30.7s. Fixed Alloy Docker log pipeline, pytest-bdd step resolution, and test expectations to match actual stack state.

findings.description: OTel Python SDK log exporter is in private module path opentelemetry.exporter.otlp.proto.http._log_exporter — functional but not part of stable public API
Loki label schema does not include custom OTel attributes (test_id) — Loki queries must use line filtering (|=) not label matching
pytest._step_context must be initialized as a new dict in each @when step, not accessed with dict indexing before initialization — consistent with existing pattern in shared_steps.py

decision: Completed Phase 2 implementation: 4 cross-plane contract tests (OBS-CONTRACT-001-004) passing in ~33s. Created synthetic workload modules for trace/metric/log generation. PR #140 created.
